name: IRSF-003b: AED Escalation Patterns in Polypharmacy Patients
description: Treatment pathway analysis focused on polypharmacy escalation in Rett syndrome patients receiving 3+ concurrent anticonvulsants (cohort 208, N=542). Reveals the order in which AEDs are added during treatment intensification, identifying common escalation sequences and combination regimens. Clinically critical for understanding which drugs tend to be added third or fourth in polypharmacy scenarios.
